overview: Solo Dairy Farm is a mobile-first website for a dairy business featuring a homepage with hero section, product catalog for milk and dairy products, a cow marketplace, online ordering with Cash on Delivery and UPI payment options, a contact page with WhatsApp integration, and a secure admin panel for managing products, orders, and customer enquiries.
features: Farm-themed homepage with hero section and featured products
Product catalog for fresh milk, ghee, butter, and curd
Cow marketplace with breed, age, milk capacity, and price details
Order system with subscriptions and one-time purchases
Cash on Delivery and UPI payment options
Contact page with WhatsApp button and location map
Floating WhatsApp chat button on all pages
Admin panel with dashboard, product/cow/order management
Image uploads for products and cows
Responsive mobile-first design with green and earthy tones
